attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
WNRCC.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID
,WNRCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
,WNRCC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE
,WNRCC.CONTEXT
,'I'  SOURCE_TYPE
, NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT      
,'N'  METRIX_FLAG                        
,'N' SALES_CREDIT_FLAG
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_COG_CUR_RAO  WNRCC
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
ON WNRCC.BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
WHERE
WNRCC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('CM','DM')
/*AND WNRCC.CONTEXT <> 'METRIX'*/
AND EXISTS (	SELECT 1 FROM  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP   X 
				WHERE X.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT =  NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT   
				AND X.SS_CD = NATL.SS_CODE    
				AND X.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'I' 
			/*	AND END_TV_DTM  = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'  */
				 )
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_COG_SLS_CRED_FLG_RAO  Y 
WHERE  WNRCC.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = Y.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID 
AND WNRCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = Y.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)

SELECT
  'REV' AS ACCOUNT_CLASS,
  ENGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE AS ACCOUNT_CODE,
  /* NAAR.SK_RULE_ID_INT AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID, */
  CASE WHEN WNGAR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID IS NOT NULL THEN SMRR_RULE.RULE_ID
   ELSE SMRR_CUR.RULE_ID
  END AS  ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,
  /* WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME, */
  CASE WHEN WNGAR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID IS NOT NULL THEN WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME          
   ELSE WNRCC.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME    
  END AS  ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
  0 AS ACCTD_AMOUNT,
  'I' AS ACTION_CODE ,
  WNRCC.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID AS ADJUSTMENT_ID,
  WNRCC.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID AS ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER,
  'RAE_COGS' AS ADJUSTMENT_TYPE,
  0 AS AMOUNT,
  1 AS BATCH_ID,
  NULL AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
  NULL AS BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
  WNRCC.CODE_COMBINATION_ID AS CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
  WNRCC.COGS_PCT AS COGS_PERCENT,
  NULL AS COMMENTS,
  WNRCC.CONTEXT AS CONTEXT,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CREATE_DATETIME,
  1 AS CREATED_BY,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CREATION_DATE,
  NULL AS CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID,
  WNRCC.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT AS CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
  WNRCC.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT AS CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
  WSCF.SALES_CREDIT_FLAG AS DEFAULT_SC_FLAG,
  NULL AS EXTENDED_AMOUNT ,
  'REV' AS EXTRACT_TYPE,
  WNRCC.FISCAL_ID AS FISCAL_ID,
  'F' AS FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG,
  WNRCC.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE AS FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)    AS GES_UPDATE_DATE ,
  WNRCC.GL_DATE AS GL_DATE,
  WNRCC.GL_POSTED_DATE AS GL_POSTED_DATE,
  NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME AS GLOBAL_NAME,
  NULL AS GROUPING_ID ,
  NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
  WNRCC.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE AS INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE,
  NULL AS INVOICE_PERCENT,
  NULL AS INVOICING_RULE_ID,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
  1 AS LAST_UPDATED_BY,
  'Y' AS LATEST_RECORD_FLAG,
  NULL AS LINE_PERCENT,
   CASE WHEN (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX'/*,'XAAS','ICMS-XAAS'*/)
   OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE') OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE ANY ('%XAAS%')))/*Added-OR: TNC Feb 2020 Release*//*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/) THEN SC_TV_XAAS.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT 
        ELSE COALESCE(SC_TV.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,SC_TV_ORIG.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT) END AS LINE_SEQ_ID  ,  
  NULL AS LINE_TYPE,
  NULL AS LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID,
  CASE  WHEN COALESCE(SC_TV.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,SC_TV_ORIG.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD) ='O' THEN COALESCE(SSO_SC.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT,SSO_SC_ORIG.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT)
    ELSE COALESCE(SSO_DFLT_SC.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT,SSO_DFLT_SC_CAL.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT)
  END AS ORDER_HEADER_ID , 
  CASE WHEN  WNGL.LINE_ID = -9999  THEN 
      CASE WHEN COALESCE(SC_TV.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,SC_TV_ORIG.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD) = 'O' THEN COALESCE(SC_TV.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT,SC_TV_ORIG.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT)
        ELSE NULL
      END
    ELSE WNGL.LINE_ID
  END AS ORDER_LINE_ID  ,
  WNGL.ORDER_NUMBER AS ORDER_NUMBER   ,
  WNRCC.ORG_ID AS ORG_ID,
  NULL AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
  NULL AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
   CASE WHEN (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX'/*,'XAAS','ICMS-XAAS'*/) 
   OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE') OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE ANY ('%XAAS%')))/*Added-OR: TNC Feb 2020 Release*//*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/)
        THEN COALESCE(NSCTT_XAAS.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_QUOTA_FLAG,'=')
        ELSE COALESCE(COALESCE(NSCTT.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_QUOTA_FLAG,NSCTT_ORIG.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_QUOTA_FLAG),'=') 
   END  AS QUOTA_FLAG ,  
  NULL AS REASON_CODE,
  NULL AS REBATE_AMOUNT,
  NULL AS REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID,
  CASE WHEN WNRCC.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG = 'Y' THEN NULL ELSE 999  END AS  REQUEST_ID,
  /* WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE  AS RULE_START_DATE, */
  CASE WHEN WNGAR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID IS NOT NULL THEN WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE    
   ELSE WNRCC.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE  
  END AS  RULE_START_DATE,
   CASE WHEN (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX'/*,'XAAS','ICMS-XAAS'*/)
 OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE') OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE ANY ('%XAAS%')))/*Added-OR: TNC Feb 2020 Release*//*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/)  
        THEN COALESCE(ESCT_INIT_VAR2.SK_CREDIT_TYPE_ID,0) 
        ELSE COALESCE(SC_TV.EP_SK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID_INT,SC_TV_ORIG.EP_SK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID_INT) END AS SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID ,  
  /*prbobba : modified for SAAS Q1FY15*/
  /*KGUVVALA : modified for XAAS as part of Q2FY15*/
  CASE WHEN (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX'/*,'XAAS','ICMS-XAAS'*/) 
  OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE') OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE ANY ('%XAAS%')))/*Added-OR: TNC Feb 2020 Release*//*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/) THEN COALESCE(ESP_XAAS.SALES_REP_ID,0)
  ELSE SC_TV.EP_SK_SALESREP_ID_INT  END SALESREP_ID ,  
  NULL AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
  NULL AS SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
  NULL AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
  WSCF.SOURCE_TYPE AS SOURCE_TYPE , 
   CASE WHEN (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX'/*,'XAAS','ICMS-XAAS'*/) 
   OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE') OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE ANY ('%XAAS%')))/*Added-OR: TNC Feb 2020 Release*//*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/) THEN SC_TV_XAAS.SPLIT_PCT
        ELSE COALESCE(SC_TV.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,SC_TV_ORIG.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT) END AS SPLIT_PERCENT ,   
  /*prbobba : modified for SAAS Q1FY15*/
  /*KGUVVALA : modified for XAAS as part of Q2FY15*/
  CASE WHEN (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('WEBEX','SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX'/*,'XAAS','ICMS-XAAS'*/) 
  OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE') OR NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%')) /*Added-OR: TNC Feb 2020 Release*//*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/) THEN COALESCE(EST_INIT_VAR2.TERRITORY_ID,  0)  ELSE SC_TV.EP_SK_TERRITORY_ID_INT  END TERRITORY_ID , 
  
  /* CASE WHEN CURRENT_DATE <= EAMPD.END_DATE   THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) ELSE EAMPD.END_DATE END AS TRANSACTION_DATE , */
  CASE WHEN CURRENT_DATE <= NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE  THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) ELSE CAST ( NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0) ) 
  END AS TRANSACTION_DATE , 
  'O' AS TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE, 
  CASE WHEN WNRCC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' and NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE  = 'LINE' THEN
     NATIL.RU_CREDIT_QUANTITY 
    ELSE NATIL.RU_DEBIT_QUANTITY  
  END  AS TRANSACTION_QUANTITY  ,
  WNRCC.AR_TRX_DATETIME AS TRX_DATE,
  NULL AS TRX_NAME,
  WNRCC.BK_AR_TRX_NUMBER AS TRX_NUMBER,
  WNRCC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE  AS TRX_TYPE,
  NULL AS UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
  NULL AS UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,
  'RAE_COGS' AS DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
  SRCP.COGS_PERCENT_KEY AS DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
  CASE WHEN (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('WEBEX','SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX' /*,'XAAS','ICMS-XAAS'*/) 
  OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE') OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE ANY ('%XAAS%')))/*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/) THEN SC_TV_XAAS.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
        ELSE COALESCE(SC_TV.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,SC_TV_ORIG.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE) END BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE   ,
   /*avandras : modified for SAAS Q1FY15*/
   /*KGUVVALA : modified for XAAS as part of Q2FY15*/
  CASE WHEN (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('WEBEX','SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX'/*,'XAAS','ICMS-XAAS'*/)
 OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE') OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE ANY ('%XAAS%'))) /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/) THEN SC_TV_XAAS.BK_SALES_REP_NUM
  ELSE COALESCE(SC_TV.SALES_REP_NUMBER,SC_TV_ORIG.SALES_REP_NUMBER) END  SALES_REP_NUMBER            ,
  CASE WHEN (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('WEBEX','SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX' /*,'XAAS','ICMS-XAAS'*/) 
  OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE') OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE ANY ('%XAAS%')))/*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/) THEN SC_TV_XAAS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
  ELSE COALESCE(SC_TV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,SC_TV_ORIG.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY)  END  SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
  CASE WHEN (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('WEBEX','SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX' /*,'XAAS','ICMS-XAAS'*/)
  OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE') OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE ANY ('%XAAS%')))/*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/) THEN -999
        ELSE COALESCE(SC_TV.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT,SC_TV_ORIG.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT) END AS SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT, 
  
  WNRCC.SOURCE_DATA_KEY5,
  WNRCC.MERAKI_FLAG
  FROM 
  $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_COG_CUR_RAO WNRCC
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
  ON WNRCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_RAE_COGS_PERCENT SRCP
  ON WNRCC.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = SRCP.SK_COGS_PERCENT_ID
  AND WNRCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SRCP.SS_CD
  AND WNRCC.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = SRCP.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_COG_LINES_RAO  WNGL 
  ON WNRCC.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = WNGL.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID
  AND WNRCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = WNGL.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_COG_RULE_RAO  WNGAR
  ON WNRCC.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID =  WNGAR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID
  AND WNRCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = WNGAR.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_COG_SLS_CRED_FLG_RAO  WSCF
  ON WNRCC.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = WSCF.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID
  AND WNRCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = WSCF.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT ENGLA
   ON ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = WNRCC.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
  /* use ST_OM_RA_RULES for rule_id : rchettri 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_ACCOUNTING_RULE NAAR
   on NAAR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME   = WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME */
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RA_RULES SMRR_RULE 
   ON SMRR_RULE.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
   AND SMRR_RULE.NAME  = WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RA_RULES SMRR_CUR 
   ON SMRR_CUR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
   AND SMRR_CUR.NAME  = WNRCC.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME /* Replaced ST with EL --Q3 */ 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
   ON WNRCC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
   ON NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
   ON (NP.ITEM_KEY = WNRCC.ITEM_KEY ) 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_SO_GLOBAL_NAME EL_GNAME
   ON EL_GNAME.ORG_ID = WNRCC.ORG_ID
   AND EL_GNAME.ACTIVE_IND = 'Y'  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP   SC_TV 
   ON SC_TV.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT =  WSCF.LINE_ID 
   AND SC_TV.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = WSCF.SOURCE_TYPE 
   AND SC_TV.SS_CD =  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
    /* AND SC_TV.END_TV_DTM  = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'  */
  /* LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_SC
   ON SC_TV.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOL_SC.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY */
  LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP   SC_TV_ORIG 
   ON SC_TV_ORIG.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT =  WSCF.LINE_ID 
   AND SC_TV_ORIG.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = WSCF.SOURCE_TYPE 
   AND SC_TV_ORIG.SS_CD =  EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD 
   AND NOT EXISTS  /* knarlapu: added to pick only CG record in case of same line  exixts in CG and Non-CG */
   (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP X WHERE  SC_TV_ORIG.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT =  X.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT 
   AND SC_TV_ORIG.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = X.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD 
   AND X.SS_CD = 'CG'  )
   /* XAAS SALES CREDITING CHANGES Q1FY18*/
   LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP_XAAS  SC_TV_XAAS 
    ON SC_TV_XAAS.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY =  WNRCC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
    AND SC_TV_XAAS.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = WSCF.SOURCE_TYPE 
    /*AND SC_TV_XAAS.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT>0  */
   AND (SC_TV_XAAS.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT>0 OR SC_TV_XAAS.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT<-1000000000) /*SK_TRX_SC_ID BIG INT CHANGE Q1FY18*/
  
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_SC /* Q1 changes */
    ON SC_TV.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT = NSOL_SC.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
    AND SC_TV.SS_CD = NSOL_SC.SS_CODE
    AND SC_TV.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'O'
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_SC_ORIG 
    ON SC_TV_ORIG.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT = NSOL_SC_ORIG.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
    AND SC_TV_ORIG.SS_CD = NSOL_SC_ORIG.SS_CODE
    AND SC_TV_ORIG.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'O'  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO_SC
   ON NSOL_SC.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SSO_SC.SALES_ORDER_KEY
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO_SC_ORIG
   ON NSOL_SC_ORIG.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SSO_SC_ORIG.SALES_ORDER_KEY
  /* Commented as part of sales credit logic change*/ 
  /*LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_CREDIT_TYPES ESCT
   on ESCT.SK_CREDIT_TYPE_ID = SC_TV.EP_SK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID_INT
   AND ESCT.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
  */ 
  /* Added as part of sales credit logic change*/
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_TV NSCTT
   ON SC_TV.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE = NSCTT.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
   AND NSCTT.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01' 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_TV NSCTT_ORIG
   ON SC_TV_ORIG.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE = NSCTT_ORIG.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
   AND NSCTT_ORIG.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01'  
  /* XAAS SALES CREDITING CHANGES Q1FY18*/
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_TV NSCTT_XAAS
   ON SC_TV_XAAS.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE = NSCTT.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
   AND NSCTT.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01' 
   /* START: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO_DFLT_SC
   ON WNGL.ORDER_NUMBER = NSO_DFLT_SC.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT              
   AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NSO_DFLT_SC.SS_CODE   
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO_DFLT_SC
   ON NSO_DFLT_SC.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SSO_DFLT_SC.SALES_ORDER_KEY
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO_DFLT_SC_CAL
   ON WNGL.ORDER_NUMBER = NSO_DFLT_SC_CAL.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT              
   AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD   
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO_DFLT_SC_CAL
   ON NSO_DFLT_SC_CAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SSO_DFLT_SC_CAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY       
  /* END: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION 
  
      
  /* INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE EAMPD 
  ON EAMPD.FISCAL_ID = WNRCC.FISCAL_ID */
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM 
   ON  WNRCC.FISCAL_ID = NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT*100 + NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT 
   
    /*prbobba : added for SAAS Q1FY15*/
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT  
  ON NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_KEY 
  LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
  ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
  
  /*START: Added as part of CF-LSS Q3FY15  */
  /*LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_SHIPTO_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIER MSC 
  ON         (NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=MSC.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY)*/
  LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_SHIPTO_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIER MSC 
  ON         (CASE WHEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY > 0  THEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
              ELSE NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
              END = MSC.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY)
  /*END: Added as part of CF-LSS Q3FY15  */
  
  
  
  LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC 
  ON (NIC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE=MSC.BRANCH_ISO_COUNTRY_CD)
  /*LEFT OUTER  JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_APSP_SALES_TERRITORY_MAP STMAP

 WNRCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE,

 OR (WNRCC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ICMS-ADJ' AND NATL_ADJ.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL')))/*Added as part BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
 ) 
 /* avandras- ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY15*/
 /*KGUVVALA : modified for XAAS as part of Q2FY15*/
   THEN CASE WHEN WNRCC.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE='REVENUE TRANSFER' THEN NII.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME       
       ELSE 
        CASE WHEN CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' THEN NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID 
              ELSE NP.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID 
            END <> 'UNKNOWN' 
          THEN NATIL.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME  
          ELSE NULL      
        END
     END
   WHEN (UPPER(WNRCC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) LIKE ANY ('ORDER MANAGEMENT%','OM-FBINV%') AND UPPER(NATL_ADJ.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME) NOT LIKE '%XAAS%' )/*Added-OR: TNC Feb 2020 Release*/
     OR UPPER(WNRCC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) = 'SERVICE RMA' 
     OR UPPER(WNRCC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) IN ( 'T4C SALES ADJ' ,'T4C - SERVICE CM')
     OR UPPER(WNRCC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) = 'FSO METRIX' 
   THEN
    CASE WHEN CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' THEN NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID 
          ELSE NP.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID 
        END <> 'UNKNOWN' 
      THEN NATIL.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME  
      ELSE NULL
    END
   ELSE  WNRCC.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME
 END AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
 
 CASE WHEN (WNRCC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS' , 'DISPUTE','ICMS-ADJ','SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX'/*,'XAAS','ICMS-XAAS'*/) 
 OR (WNRCC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS')/*Added as part BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
 OR (WNRCC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT') AND NATL_ADJ.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE ANY ('%XAAS%') )/*Added-OR: TNC Feb 2020 Release*/ /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/
 OR (WNRCC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ICMS-ADJ' AND NATL_ADJ.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL')))/*Added as part BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
 ) 
 /* avandras- ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY15*/
 /*KGUVVALA : modified for XAAS as part of Q2FY15*/
   THEN CASE WHEN WNRCC.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE='REVENUE TRANSFER' THEN WNRCC_1.GL_DATE  
       ELSE
        CASE WHEN  CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' THEN NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID 
              ELSE NP.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID 
            END <> 'UNKNOWN' 
          THEN NATIL.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE   
          ELSE WNRCC.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE
        END
     END
   WHEN (UPPER(WNRCC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) LIKE ANY ('ORDER MANAGEMENT%','OM-FBINV%') AND UPPER(NATL_ADJ.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME) NOT LIKE '%XAAS%' )/*Added-OR: TNC Feb 2020 Release*/
     OR UPPER(WNRCC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) = 'SERVICE RMA' 
     OR UPPER(WNRCC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) IN ( 'T4C SALES ADJ' , 'T4C - SERVICE CM')
     OR UPPER(WNRCC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) = 'FSO METRIX' 
   THEN
    CASE  WHEN CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' THEN NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID 
          ELSE NP.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID 
        END <> 'UNKNOWN' 
      THEN NATIL.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE  
      ELSE WNRCC.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE
    END
   ELSE WNRCC.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE
 END AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE
 
 FROM
 $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_COG_CUR_RAO  WNRCC
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_COG_VAL_RAO  WNRCC_1     
  ON WNRCC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNRCC_1.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL_ADJ
  ON NATL_ADJ.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNRCC.BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
  ON NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL_ADJ.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
  ON WNRCC.ITEM_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NII 
  ON NP.ITEM_KEY = NII.ITEM_KEY
  AND NII.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT = 1
 WHERE
  WNRCC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM' 
 /* AND WNRCC.RU_BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_KEY < 0 */ 
 AND (WNRCC.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME IS NULL  OR  WNRCC.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME  = 'UNKNOWN')

				AND DRVDB.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='RAE_COGS' )

EOXRCP.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID 
,NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
,NAT.BK_AR_TRX_NUMBER              
,NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME
,NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT
,NULL AS CONTEXT  
,NAT.RU_BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_KEY         
,NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE 
,NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE,           
/*START: Added as part of CF-LSS Q3FY15  */
/*NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,*/
 CASE WHEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY > 0  THEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
            ELSE NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
            END as SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
/*END: Added as part of CF-LSS Q3FY15  */      
 NAT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,NAT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
/* ,NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE  --Q3 */ 
,EOXRCP.CURRENCY_CODE AS TRXL_CURR_CODE      
,EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE   
,NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
,NAT.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG
,NATL.BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
,NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
,CASE WHEN NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE = 'LINE' THEN NATIL.PRODUCT_KEY  WHEN NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE = 'FREIGHT'  
THEN NATFL.PRODUCT_KEY ELSE NULL END ITEM_KEY
,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE 
,NATIL.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME  
,NATIL.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE 
,NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME        
/*,(CASE WHEN EOXRCP.GL_DATE >= CAST(EOXRCP.ATTRIBUTE11 AS TIMESTAMP(0) FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YY' ) 
THEN EOXRCP.GL_DATE ELSE CAST(EOXRCP.ATTRIBUTE11 AS TIMESTAMP(0) FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YY'  ) END)  AS  GL_DATE_1 --COMMENTED Q3 */
,(CASE WHEN  EOXRCP.GL_DATE  >= CAST(EOXRCP.COGS_REV_GL_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0) FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YY' ) 
THEN  EOXRCP.GL_DATE ELSE CAST(EOXRCP.COGS_REV_GL_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0) FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YY'  ) END)  AS  GL_DATE_1 /* NEED confirmation */
,NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE
,CASE WHEN EOXRCP.COGS_DEFERRAL_FLAG = 'Y' THEN
	CASE WHEN 
		SUBSTR(ENGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,1,2) = '12' THEN 0
		ELSE EOXRCP.DV_PERCENT
		END
	ELSE EOXRCP.DV_PERCENT
	END COGS_PCT
,ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
,NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
/*,EOXRCP.CODE_COMBINATION_ID*/
,EOXRCP.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
/* ,(CASE WHEN EOXRCP.GL_DATE >= CAST(EOXRCP.ATTRIBUTE11 AS TIMESTAMP(0) FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YY' ) 
THEN NRAGD.GL_DTM ELSE CAST(EOXRCP.ATTRIBUTE12 AS TIMESTAMP(0) FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YY'  ) END) AS GL_POSTED_DATE --COMMENTED Q3*/
,(CASE WHEN  EOXRCP.GL_DATE >= CAST(EOXRCP.COGS_REV_GL_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0) FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YY' ) 
THEN EOXRCP.GL_POSTED_DATE ELSE CAST(EOXRCP.COGS_REV_POSTED_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0) FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YY'  ) END) AS GL_POSTED_DATE 
,EAMPD.FISCAL_ID AS FISCAL_ID
,EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT AS ORG_ID
/*ADDED THE FOLLOWING COLUMNS FOR XLA*/
,'REV' AS ACCOUNT_CLASS
/*,NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY*/
,NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
,EOXRCP.SOURCE_DATA_KEY5
,EOXRCP.MERAKI_FLAG
FROM
 $$STGDB.ST_CG1_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE EAMPD,
 $$ETLVWDB.EL_RAO_XXCFI_RAE_COGS_PERCNT EOXRCP
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	ON EOXRCP.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
INNER JOIN   $$ETLVWDB.SM_RAE_COGS_PERCENT SRCP  
	ON SRCP.SK_COGS_PERCENT_ID             = EOXRCP.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID
	AND  SRCP.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
	AND SRCP.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID = EOXRCP.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID
	INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
	ON SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT  = CAST(EOXRCP.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID AS INTEGER) 
	AND SATL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
INNER JOIN   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
	ON SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
	/*ADDED THE FOLLOWING JOINS FOR XLA*/   
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
	ON NATL.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY  EOUGC
	ON NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE= EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE              
	AND NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY     
LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS 
	ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
	ON NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
	AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
	AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
    ON NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = EOXRCP.LEDGER_ID
    AND NSOB.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE

INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
	ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
	AND NSOB.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE */  /*  Added as part of XLA */
/* INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  EVGLCC
	ON (EVGLCC.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = EOXRCP.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
	AND EVGLCC.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME )
 INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT ENGLA
            ON EVGLCC.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY   commented Q3*/ 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  ENGLA    /*  Modified to XLA joins */
     ON (ENGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = EOXRCP.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
     AND ENGLA.GLOBAL_NAME = EOXRCP.GLOBAL_NAME )
LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
	ON NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_FREIGHT_LINE NATFL
	ON NATFL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
/* commented : rchettri 
LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TAX_LINE NATTL 
	ON NATTL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_ACCOUNTING_RULE NAAR  
	ON NAAR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME = NATIL.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME */
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LINE NRASL
	ON NRASL.SK_SCHEDULE_LINE_ID_INT = EOXRCP.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID
	AND NRASL.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE      
/* INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJSTMNT_GL_DSTRBTN NRAGD
	ON (CASE WHEN EOXRCP.COGS_PERCENT > 0 
	THEN NRASL.RU_CREDIT_RAE_ADJ_GL_DIST_KEY ELSE NRASL.RU_DEBIT_RAE_ADJ_GL_DIST_KEY END) = NRAGD.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_GL_DSTRBTN_KEY   Commented - Q3*/ 
WHERE NAT.AR_TRX_COMPLETE_FLAG = 'Y'
AND EOXRCP.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID IS NOT NULL 
AND EOXRCP.COGS_REV_GL_DATE IS NOT NULL 
AND EOXRCP.COGS_REV_POSTED_DATE IS NOT NULL
AND EOXRCP.COGS_DEFERRAL_FLAG IN ('Y', 'N')
AND EOXRCP.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG'
AND EOXRCP.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID in (
sel adjustment_line_id from $$STGDB.ST_CG1_COGS_DEF_ATTRISSUE_0422
)
/* AND NRAGD.GL_POSTED_FLG = 'Y'  Commented - Q3*/
AND EOXRCP.GL_DATE IS NOT NULL  /* Added Q3 */  
AND COALESCE(EOXRCP.GL_POSTED_FLAG, 'N') = 'Y'

				AND DRVDR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='RAE_COGS'
				)
AND NOT EXISTS 
            ( SELECT 1 FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_BKG DRVDB  
				WHERE DRVDB.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY = SRCP.COGS_PERCENT_KEY
				AND DRVDB.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='RAE_COGS'
